name: Yahoo! JAPAN Web API
description: LY Corporations developer portal — search, maps, shopping, Kakaku and Japanese-morphology text APIs.

seo.title: Yahoo! JAPAN Web API — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Yahoo! JAPAN Web API: LY Corporations developer portal — search, maps, shopping, Kakaku and Japanese-morphology text APIs.

when_to_use: Japanese morphological analysis API for NLP pipeline
Yahoo Japan shopping data for price comparison tools
Maps API for Japanese address and geolocation services
Web search API for Japanese-language content discovery
Kakaku price data integration for Japanese retail apps

pros: Broad free API portfolio spanning search, maps, and shopping
Japanese morphology APIs handle tokenization natively
Well-known stable brand under LY Corporation
Free tiers cover many prototyping use cases
cons: Rate limits tight compared to Google equivalents
Some APIs deprecated or in maintenance mode
Terms of use restrict commercial reuse in some cases
review.verdict: Indispensable for Japan-market apps needing local data and morphology, with uneven doc quality and TOS friction.
review.best_for: Japan-market apps needing local search, maps, shopping, or Japanese-language tokenization.
review.not_for: Global products or teams without Japanese-language support.
